items.quote: Mehdi shipped features fast and kept the codebase clean and well-structured. He noticeably cut our page load times and was a dependable part of the team.
items.name: Team Lead

items.quote: Working with Mehdi on our FastAPI backend was smooth — he turned complex research models into production-ready APIs and genuinely cared about performance.
items.name: Research Collaborator

items.quote: A quick problem-solver and a great communicator. He delivered a polished, responsive UI and handled the API integrations end to end.
items.name: Project Stakeholder
